calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-20-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Laura Martinez.
Petitioners: Katerrina Rodriguez Liveri and Benjamin Rodriguez, are present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minors: Ntenis Rodriguez and Christopher Ben Rodriguez, were sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Ntenis Rodriguez Liveri and Christopher Ben Rodriguez Liveri.
Decree signed in open court.
